qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which college entities with state equal to 'LA', having at least one related tryout record (linked on college.cname = tryout.cname) with ppos equal to 'mid', whose tryout record itself has at least one related player record (linked on tryout.pid = player.pid) with hs at most '600' and pname equal to 'Eddie'?
